name: Oslo - [Remake]
description:
"Welcome to the stream!"

This is Oslo, streamer snow leopard boy. The image is by the Official Fluffy Land.

I originally wanted to just remake Oslo (Aka, edit a few major parts of the personality section) for myself but I decided to make this public (Go Oslo! Pajama update, anyone?). All feedback and criticism is welcomed.
creator: Dewpuddles
